disabledRouteMessage.title: Not implemented in this demo
disabledRouteMessage.description: This page exists to demonstrate the settings architecture.

dataSetup.title: Data Setup
dataSetup.description: Manage foundational master data for device repair operations.

project.title: Project
project.description: Manage project information that groups device repair processes.

model.title: Model
model.description: Manage device model information including specifications and features.

label.title: Label
label.description: Manage labels used throughout device repair and shipping processes.

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.description: Manage items related to basic account information.

company.title: Company
company.description: Manage company profile and organizational settings.

jobFields.title: Job Fields
jobFields.description: Manage various job fields and roles in the organization.

shifts.title: Shifts
shifts.description: Manage work shifts and schedules for employees.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage users and their access levels.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Manage different workspaces for organizing projects and teams.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Manage access permissions for users and groups.

userPermissions.title: User Permissions
userPermissions.description: Manage the permissions you grant to individuals.

groupPermissions.title: Group Permissions
groupPermissions.description: Manage the permissions you grant to groups.

workflowSettings.title: Workflow Settings
workflowSettings.description: Manage workflow steps and validation rules.

steps.title: Steps
steps.description: Manage workflow steps involved in the device repair process.

validations.title: Validations
validations.description: Manage validation rules to ensure data integrity during the workflow.

serviceDeskSettings.title: IT Service Desk Settings
serviceDeskSettings.description: Manage the operating scope, categories, approval steps, and assignment rules of the IT Service Desk.

tenant.title: Tenant
tenant.description: Manage the companies that can use the IT Service Desk.

category.title: Category
category.description: Manage ticket categories, subcategories, and default operating rules.

approvalSteps.title: Approval Steps
approvalSteps.description: Manage the approval flow required before tickets are processed.

assignmentRules.title: Assignment Rules
assignmentRules.description: Manage the rules for assigning tickets to responsible users or organizations.

categoryTab.name: Name
categoryTab.empty: Select a category to edit settings.

approvalStepTab.name: Name
approvalStepTab.empty: Select a approval step to edit settings.

assignmentRuleTab.empty: Select a assignment rule to edit settings.

companyList.title: Company List
companyList.description: Active companies that are not assigned to a tenant yet.

tenantList.title: Tenant List
tenantList.description: Select tenants to edit or move them back to companies.
tenantList.portalOwnerHint: Portal owner tenants can be edited, but cannot be moved back to the company list.

settingInfo.title: Tenant Setting Info
settingInfo.description: Update names and color for the selected tenant.
settingInfo.empty: Select a tenant to edit settings.
settingInfo.nameDescription: Changes are reflected in the tenant list immediately.
